allow: Bash(which python3 && pip show alembic 2>&1 | head -5)
Bash(docker compose exec api alembic upgrade head 2>&1)
Bash(docker compose exec api alembic -x sqlalchemy.url=postgresql://alpha:alpha@postgres:5432/alpha_engine upgrade head 2>&1)
Bash(docker compose exec api python scripts/seed.py 2>&1)
Bash(sleep 2 && curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/v1/challenges | python3 -m json.tool 2>&1 | head -40)
Bash(cd /Users/wilding/Documents/alpha-engine && docker compose up --build -d frontend 2>&1 | tail -12)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Initial commit — Alpha Engine sports prediction platform

Full-stack sports prediction app with Next.js 14 frontend and Python backend.

Frontend:
- Sportsbook-grade 3-column dashboard \(left rail + markets + slip rail\)
- MarketsTable with odds buttons, Decision Queue, CompareModal
- DashboardLeftRail \(sport/league tree\), SlipRail \(queue + watchlist + alerts\)
- Dark design tokens, 13px density, teal accent system
- Challenges, leaderboards, ELO movers, performance snapshots

Backend:
- FastAPI prediction pipeline
- Alembic migrations, PostgreSQL, Docker Compose

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git remote add origin https://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@github.com/zak473/alpha-engine.git && git push -u origin main 2>&1)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: Quant Terminal full visual redesign

Complete design system overhaul — Bloomberg + modern SaaS density.

Token system:
- 3 surface layers: bg0/bg1/bg2 \(graphite dark\)
- 2 border levels: border0/border1
- Single accent: electric cyan #00d4ff
- Status: positive/negative/warning/info
- CSS vars in globals.css, Tailwind mapped, JS tokens.ts mirror
- Tabular numerals globally, JetBrains Mono for all metrics

Primitives rebuilt:
- Button \(primary/secondary/ghost/destructive, sm/md/lg\)
- Badge + StatusBadge + OutcomeBadge \(token-based, no raw colors\)
- PanelCard \(title/subtitle/action/toolbar slots, flush/tight/normal\)
- StateTabs + NavTabs \(underline + segmented styles\)
- Tooltip \(compact, mono, CSS-only\)
- Modal \(portal, Escape, size variants\)
- Skeleton + SkeletonTable + SkeletonRow
- StatCard, EmptyState, Table — all token-native

Layout:
- Sidebar: dense nav, grouped sections, accent active state, minimal
- TopBar: title + env badge + search + user chip, 2.75rem height

Charts \(Recharts\):
- All 6 charts updated to chartDefaults from tokens.ts
- Consistent grid/axis/tooltip styling across CalibrationChart,
  EloComparisonChart, FeatureDriverChart, ROIChart,
  SimulationDistributionChart, SparklineChart

Pages updated:
- /matches — dense DataTable, sport filter chips, density toggle
- /matches/[id] — 2-col layout, probability cards, stats, charts
- /performance — KPI strip, ROI chart, sport breakdown table
- /challenges — segmented tabs, challenge cards, join flow
- /challenges/[id] — underline tabs, leaderboard, feed, rules
- /design-system — new: token swatches, type scale, all components

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
